DSDS 0.1
Overview Root Schema
accessibility artifact-reference example extensions guideline link metadata rich-text status usecase
anatomy api component design-specifications state variant
token
style
pattern

DSDS API Definitions

Definitions for documenting the code-level interface of a component: properties, events, slots, CSS custom properties, CSS shadow parts, data attributes, methods, and the composite API object.

Source: components/api.schema.json

8 definitions in this file:

  • apiProperty
  • apiEvent
  • apiSlot
  • apiCssCustomProperty
  • apiCssPart
  • apiDataAttribute
  • apiMethod
  • componentApi

apiProperty

A configurable property of a component. Pairs a human-readable type string with an optional machine-readable JSON Schema.

object

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
namestringrequiredThe property name as used in code.
typestringrequiredA human-readable type description for display.
descriptionrichTextrequired
requiredbooleanrequiredWhether this property is required.
schemaobjectoptionalA JSON Schema (Draft 2020-12) object defining the property's type in a machine-readable form.
defaultValueanyoptionalThe default value in its native JSON type. Accepts any JSON type: string (e.g., 'primary'), number (e.g., 44), boolean (e.g., true), object, array, or null. Tools MAY format this value for display.
examplesexample[]optionalExample values for this property.
sincestringoptionalThe version in which this property was introduced.
deprecatedbooleanoptionalWhether this property is deprecated.
deprecationNoticestringoptionalWhat to use instead, if deprecated.

References: richText, example

apiEvent

An event emitted by a component.

object

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
namestringrequiredThe event name.
descriptionrichTextrequired
payloadstringoptionalDescription of the event payload shape.
sincestringoptionalThe version in which this event was introduced.

References: richText

apiSlot

A content insertion point of a component.

object

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
namestringrequiredThe slot name. Use 'default' for the unnamed/default slot.
descriptionrichTextrequired
acceptedContentrichTextoptional
sincestringoptionalThe version in which this slot was introduced.

References: richText

apiCssCustomProperty

A CSS custom property exposed by a component.

object

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
namestringrequiredThe full property name including -- prefix.
Pattern: ^--
descriptionrichTextrequired
defaultValuestringoptionalThe default value of the CSS custom property (e.g., 'var(--color-action-primary)', '1rem', 'transparent').
typestringoptionalThe expected CSS value type (e.g., 'color', 'dimension').
sincestringoptionalThe version in which this custom property was introduced.

References: richText

apiCssPart

A CSS shadow part exposed by a component.

object

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
namestringrequiredThe part name as used in ::part() selectors.
descriptionrichTextrequired
sincestringoptionalThe version in which this part was introduced.

References: richText

apiDataAttribute

A data attribute used by a component.

object

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
namestringrequiredThe full attribute name including data- prefix.
Pattern: ^data-
descriptionrichTextrequired
valuesstring[]optionalThe set of possible values.
sincestringoptionalThe version in which this attribute was introduced.

References: richText

apiMethod

A public method on a component instance.

object

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
namestringrequiredThe method name.
descriptionrichTextrequired
parametersstringoptionalDescription of the parameter signature.
returnTypestringoptionalDescription of the return value.
sincestringoptionalThe version in which this method was introduced.

References: richText

componentApi

The code-level interface of a component.

object

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
propertiesapiProperty[]optionalConfigurable properties.
eventsapiEvent[]optionalEvents emitted.
slotsapiSlot[]optionalContent insertion points.
cssCustomPropertiesapiCssCustomProperty[]optionalCSS custom properties.
cssPartsapiCssPart[]optionalCSS shadow parts.
dataAttributesapiDataAttribute[]optionalData attributes.
methodsapiMethod[]optionalPublic methods.

References: apiProperty, apiEvent, apiSlot, apiCssCustomProperty, apiCssPart, apiDataAttribute, apiMethod
